_comment: RamShield IPC traffic profiles — maps L3/L4/L7 attack classes to connection-report fields (authorized testing only)

l7_http_flood.description: Layer-7 GET flood — high RPS, mostly 200, browser-like sizes (OWASP/Wiz L7)

l7_post_rudy.description: RUDY-style large POST bodies — drains app memory (slow POST class)

l7_slowloris.description: Slow/low — few bytes, same IP, connection hold simulation

l4_syn_wave.description: Protocol SYN-wave — subnet bursts, small packets, state-table stress

volumetric_udp_sim.description: Volumetric L3/4 — tiny packets, extreme volume, many sources

botnet_distributed.description: High-entropy botnet — max IP spread, low per-source rate (Shannon test)

dns_amp_sim.description: Amplification pattern — many /24s spike together briefly

credential_stuff.description: App-layer credential spray — 401/403 heavy, rotating IPs

red_team_full.description: Multi-vector chain: volumetric → subnet → botnet → errors (DigiCert sim guide)
